C

CanAge - Interface in com.example.simul2d.Entities
Trait for entities that age and can die over time.
CanAttack - Interface in com.example.simul2d.Entities
Trait for entities that can perform an attack action.
CanDefend - Interface in com.example.simul2d.Entities
Trait for entities that provide defensive capability.
CanGrow - Interface in com.example.simul2d.Entities
Trait interface for objects that can grow over time.
CanPropagate - Interface in com.example.simul2d.Entities
Trait interface for objects that can propagate to neighboring cells or locations.
Cell - Class in com.example.simul2d.grid
A grid cell used by the simulation to represent a discrete location.
Cell() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
 
Cell(int, int) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
Constructs a new Cell at the provided integer coordinates with an empty entity collection.
changeHoldClick() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.UiState
Toggles the hold-click state.
changeHoldClick(boolean) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.UiState
Sets the hold-click state.
changePause() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationState
Toggles the paused flag.
changePause(boolean) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationState
 
CIRC_MOLD1 - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Entities
 
CircMold1 - Class in com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold
A simple mold that grows slowly and has a low probability of propagation.
CircMold1() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.CircMold1
Constructs a CircMold1 with parameters that slow down ageing.
CircularMold - Class in com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold
An abstract mold whose propagation pattern is circular (all directions within Manhattan distance 1 to 3).
CircularMold(int, int, int, double, Entities, double, double) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.CircularMold
Constructs a CircularMold with the given growth parameters and entity type.
clear() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.GraphController
Clears both charts, per-series labels and resets summary labels.
clear() - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.ConsoleRenderSystem
Clears the terminal using ANSI escape sequences.
CLEAR_ENTITIES - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.ToolsType
 
clearEntities() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
 
ClearEntitiesCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command to remove all entities from the cell at ClearEntitiesCommand.position().
ClearEntitiesCommand(Vec2) - Constructor for record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.ClearEntitiesCommand
Creates an instance of a ClearEntitiesCommand record class.
com.example.simul2d - module com.example.simul2d

com.example.simul2d.grid - package com.example.simul2d.grid
The grid package contains lightweight domain types and behaviors for a simple 2D simulation.
com.example.simul2d.JavaFX - package com.example.simul2d.JavaFX
 
com.example.simul2d.Systems - package com.example.simul2d.Systems
 
com.example.simul2d.Systems.input - package com.example.simul2d.Systems.input

CombatSystem - Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems
Simple combat resolution system executed per-cell.
CombatSystem() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Systems.CombatSystem
 
Command - Interface in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Marker interface for parsed input commands.
COMMAND_QUEUE - Static variable in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.InputHandler
 
CommandType - Enum Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Enumeration of the supported input commands.
CONCRETE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.grid.Material
 
ConsoleMain - Class in com.example.simul2d.Console
Console-based entry point for running the simulation loop.
ConsoleMain() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Console.ConsoleMain
 
ConsoleMain.SimulationRun - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Console
Small holder describing a running simulation: the thread, the state and the loop.
ConsoleRenderSystem - Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems
Handles console rendering of the simulation state.
ConsoleRenderSystem(SimulationState) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Systems.ConsoleRenderSystem
Creates a renderer bound to a specific simulation state.
contentUpdate(Object) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.UpdateSimulationSystem
Placeholder hook for content-driven updates.
coordinate() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Entities.CoorWeight
Returns the value of the coordinate record component.
CoorWeight - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Entities
A simple record to hold a coordinate and its associated weight for propagation purposes.
CoorWeight(Vec2, int) - Constructor for record class com.example.simul2d.Entities.CoorWeight
Creates an instance of a CoorWeight record class.
createEntity() - Method in enum class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Entities
Creates a new instance of the concrete `Entity` associated with this enum constant.
